scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test:unit: vitest run test/runtime.test.ts -t "validates all authoritative schema fixtures|help shows the single-word launcher|tui command parser|phase packets carry docs context|phase packets carry web research|patch harness|compiles markdown acceptance criteria|config validation rejects bad llama.cpp|config validation rejects bad web research"
scripts.test:contract: vitest run test/runtime.test.ts -t "missing config uses defaults|invalid config errors are reported once|chat reset clears|model routing honors|models list reports|models list falls back|models list shows llama.cpp|doctor reports MISSING_MODEL|web search uses|setup web configures|command verifier|verification plan|internal API handlers|eval export and validate|eval chat-lab|eval build-lab"
scripts.test:integration: vitest run test/runtime.test.ts -t "tui snapshot renders|tui command mode executes|mmc init creates|chat collects an app brief|chat handles a simple Snake game|repo brain detects|repo brain ignores|setup backend llamacpp|models probe code_writer uses a llama.cpp|auto-started llama.cpp|run --task applies|run --task exits nonzero|run --mission rejects invalid|run --task rejects|verification failure prevents|eval benchmark exports|eval benchmark rejects invalid|mission resume selects"
scripts.test:uat: npm run build && node scripts/uat-conversation-gauntlet.mjs && node bin/microcoder.js eval build-lab
scripts.chat:lab: npm run build && node bin/microcoder.js eval chat-lab
scripts.build:lab: npm run build && node bin/microcoder.js eval build-lab
scripts.test:regression: vitest run test/runtime.test.ts -t "help shows the single-word launcher|tui command parser maps build commands|chat collects an app brief|chat handles a simple Snake game|chat handles a todo list|chat replaces stale vague collecting state|eval chat-lab|eval build-lab|does not recompile|shows the compiled spec|build it|invalid config errors are reported once|async CLI failures|doctor reports MISSING_MODEL|models probe code_writer uses a llama.cpp|auto-started llama.cpp|run --task exits nonzero|run --mission rejects invalid|eval benchmark rejects invalid|run --task rejects out-of-scope|verification failure prevents|command verifier blocks|patch harness rejects|patch harness unwraps incomplete"
